2254180.name: Apollo Valley
2254180.description:
Apollo Valley is a minimalist thriller about facing off against an invisible AI.

Take control of a lone astronaut investigating an abandoned ship in the far reaches of what we know.

  • STEALTH THRILLER: Explore a ship haunted by a malevolent presence, and find the way to take back control.
  • A SENTIENT FORCE: Avoid the AI as it hunts you down. Look carefully at the lights and cameras, and you may have the upper hand.
  • SPACE OPERA: Experience a narrative inspired by Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey.
2254180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
